improvement: The account-scoped Pages project discovery workflow now probes the canonical URL returned by Cloudflare and fails closed unless that exact URL serves the expected research-surface identity.

checks: both project-discovery and hostname-probe contract tests are invoked
canonical URL is read from Cloudflare project evidence
probe requested_url must equal the normalized discovered canonical URL
workflow fails unless classification is research_surface_verified
combined privacy-safe evidence artifact is uploaded

privacy_boundary: No Cloudflare account ID, API token, authorization header, cookie, response body, private chat, health data, or personal identifier is persisted.
limits: The workflow has not yet run with the cloudflare-research environment.
No resolving hostname or successful deployment is claimed.
Exact deployed-commit provenance remains a separate required proof.
No diagnosis, treatment, medical-validity, or scientific-truth claim is made.
falsification_route: Dispatch the workflow with valid Cloudflare environment credentials; any absent or ambiguous project, missing pages.dev hostname, unresolved URL, unexpected content, unhealthy response, or identity mismatch must fail the job and prevent acceptance evidence.
